title: きらきら！キミはトレーナー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Tracen Meet, and Ines Fujin's family is among the
throngs of excited spectators.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text: Ines has told us so much about you. We all came to watch her today, and... sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry... I just can't help but feel overjoyed seeing her so happy
here at the academy...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Ines has loved to run for as long as I can remember. She would run
around all day if you let her. She even joined the track team...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
However, as my health declined during her last years of elementary
school... she began skipping practice to stay home and help me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hm? Track practice? Ummm, nah, it's fine! Family always comes first!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Even as I saw her fall behind her peers, I continued to rely on her. It
pains me to say this, but... we would have struggled without her.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
She always puts others above herself... So all I've ever hoped for is
that she gets the chance to spread her wings and run freely.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next moment, the crowd goes silent, all eyes on the starting
gate—the race begins.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the Tracen Meet 2,400-meter turf race kicks off! Ines Fujin takes
the lead in an incredible start!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin continues to control the race! Fan-favorite Mejiro Ryan
trails behind, saving up her energy for the right moment to pounce!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: "A Guide to Making Front Running Look Easy"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Ines Fujin flips through the training guide I wrote, I explain that
this will be the blueprint to her success... All we need to do is make
sure she has the skills to pull it off.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: So that's why you made this. Haha, as usual, you really love going the extra mile!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Mmkay, let's see what we have here: improving running form to boost
speed, breathing tips to recover stamina, and...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh, this one's new...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (Huff, huff, huff... Take big strides and keep your arms swinging... all while maintaining the lead—this is brutal!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...I can do it!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The racers round the final corner into the backstretch! Ines Fujin is
still in the lead! But here comes Mejiro Ryan's explosive break!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Ryan's still got a lot of gas left... If it were the old me, she would've
dusted me by now—but not today!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I worked my tail off with my trainer! I'm stronger than ever! No
chance I'm gonna lose... I will win!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: This is my race!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin refuses to slow down! Can she take it all the way, or will
Ryan catch up?! It all comes down to this! And the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Together
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Ines Fujin!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff... Phew... I reeeally looove this feeling... Heheh...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Younger Sisters
text_block_list.text: Ineees!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Guys! Huff, huff... Did you see the race? Was I awesome, or what?

text_block_list.name: Ines's Younger Twin Sister A
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep! You were amazing! Super cool! I've never seen you run so
fast!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Younger Twin Sister B
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh, uh-huh! I wanna see you run again!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you found such a wonderful trainer. I'm sooo proud of you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Whoa, déjà vu... Seeing my family rushing over, laughing and
crying... It's just like that day.)

text_block_list.name: Ev ent Caster
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin takes the wiiiiin! A remarkable conclusion to her junior high
track team career!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Younger Twin Sister A
text_block_list.text: Amazing, amazing! You were so cool, Ines! The best!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Younger Twin Sister B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're not really gonna stop racing, right? You're still gonna run,
right? Right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I remember their sparkling eyes. They were practically begging for
me to keep running. Maybe that's why...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Mom, I'm sorry... I...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I promise I'll work part-time and send money home! I'll visit often too!
So... please let me go to Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, um...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna keep doing my best and run even faster!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text: Of course, dear! We'll always be cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, I won! Oh, and my mom wants to tell you something.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for doing so much for our daughter. I hope you'll continue
to guide her as her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin looks at me, and the words "temporary trainer" stick in my
throat.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, I want a trainer that radiates confidence. After all, they're
gonna be my partner in crime!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want someone who knows just what to say to get me motivated!
Someone I want to follow to the ends of the earth!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And you were that person in the lead-up to this race. I know you were
scared before, but... surely you can say it now, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt she's grown significantly. Most of it's due to her
hard work... but I guess I did play some part in it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Go on...
choice_data_list: I want to stay by your side and watch you run!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Hahah! Yeah, perfect answer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After saying goodbye to her family, Ines Fujin playfully pokes my
shoulder.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm surprised! You were like a lost puppy before, but look at
you now, dropping bold lines like that!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It just made me smile, is all. Anyway, can't wait to start training with
you! Trust me, you're gonna be sick of seeing me run by the end!
Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her bright smile brims with hope, and her round eyes sparkle with
confidence. As for me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I no longer feel lost.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've finally found my place—running alongside this happy-go-lucky
racer as she races down the turf.
